title: Create: Stone Generator
description: A small addon to create the various create stones
body:
Join on my Discord Channel: https://discord.gg/SfW7BAapnk
This mod allows you to create the various generators of:
- Crimsite
- Veridium
- Asurine
- Ochrum

You simply create it like a cobblestone generator, but instead of lava and water, you put molten and water in it.

I thank the Create Team for giving me the permission and opportunity to create this Create addon
